The health benefits of Calceolaria are attributed to its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, potentially aiding in the relief of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Calceolaria include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Calceolaria is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote relaxation and ease symptoms associated with anxiety and insomnia.
